title: Stonecutter Extra Copper Options
description: Adds the ability to craft copper chains, bars, and lightning rods to the stonecutter regular and waxed variants. Copper retains waxed and oxidation variant.
body: Adds the ability to craft copper bars, copper chains, and lightning rods through the stonecutter. Retains the waxed and oxidation state of the original block used in the resulting recipe. Also allows copper blocks to be decrafted into ingots, and copper ingots to be decrafted into nuggets.
